title: Manufacturing Engineer - Patanjali Ayurved - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Patanjali Ayurved - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Patanjali Ayurved has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Patanjali Ayurved:
Patanjali Ayurved is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patanjali Ayurved!
